articles.title: Researchers Propose New Way to Manage Financial Risk When AI Agents Fumble Trades
articles.description: A newly proposed agentic settlement standard would hold fees in escrow and bring underwriters into AI agent transactions.
articles.content: As AI agents begin to handle payments, financial trades, and other transactions, there’s growing concern over the financial risks that fall on the human behind the agent when those systems fail. A consortium of researchers argues that current AI safe... [2177 chars]

articles.title: No Real People Were Polled: AI Is Now Fabricating What "The Public Thinks"
articles.description: ZeroHedge - On a long enough timeline, the survival rate for everyone drops to zero
articles.content: The other day Axios ran a piece that cited "findings" that a majority of people trusted their doctors and nurses. Turns out, those "findings" were completely fabricated by a company called Aaru - using AI (causing Axios to issue an editor's note and ... [4047 chars]

articles.title: MP News: AI-Powered System To Feature Criminal Profiling, Predictive Policing And 20-language Translation
articles.description: MP is set to roll out CCTNS 2.0, an AI-powered upgrade of the existing police tracking system. The platform will enable criminal profiling, link cases to suspects, predict crime-prone areas, and assist in traffic and surveillance management. FIRs and court warrants will be instantly accessible, with translation support in 20 languages, improving police efficiency and coordination with courts.
articles.content:
Bhopal (Madhya Pradesh): The Crime and Criminal Tracking Network and Systems (CCTNS) 2.0, set to be introduced in police stations soon, will be smarter and faster.
The new system will improve coordination between the police and courts and streamline ... [2749 chars]
